title: Natuworkguy/Flash
summary: An AI-powered command-line interface that bridges natural language and shell execution.

title: janaador0827-commits/simulacra-forge
summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: nidhi-menon/HealthSteward
summary: Local, privacy-first agentic AI for patients navigating fragmented care

title: jrodolfo/local-genai-lab
summary: Local-first GenAI lab with a React frontend and Spring Boot backend, supporting Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, Hugging Face, RAG document retrieval, MCP-backed AWS tools, streaming chat, persistent sessions, and artifact/report workflows.

title: ahwurm/localharness
summary: An open-source, model-agnostic agent harness for local LLMs. Define agents in YAML (tools, memory, deny-first permissions) and run them against any OpenAI-compatible endpoint: vLLM, Ollama, LM Studio, or llama.cpp.

title: richie-rich90454/training-generator
summary: Training Generator is a cross-platform desktop app built with Electron and Node.js that converts documents (PDF, DOCX, DOC, RTF, TXT, MD, HTML) into structured AI training data. Using local Ollama models, it extracts instructions, Q&A pairs, and conversation data for machine learning, AI fine-tuning, and NLP workflows, while keeping all processing.

title: RenanMiqueloti/agents-AI
summary: Agentes LangGraph com HITL via interrupt(), MCP server custom e evals LLM-as-judge — multi-provider (Claude, OpenAI, Ollama)

title: JosephOIbrahim/Synapse
summary: AI copilot inside Houdini — plain English becomes real nodes. Every action undo-safe, recorded, consent-gated: receipts, not magic. It validates node-graphs against the RUNNING Houdini before building — probes beat memory. Five engines, 115 tools, 4,387 tests. Live-verified on Houdini 22.

title: alexvilelabah/bah-browser
summary: Open-source AI browser agent — type plain-language commands and Bah operates the web for you. Works with free AI, cloud providers, or local Ollama models.

title: Akunimal/AI-Router-Blocker-AiO
summary: Open-source DevSecOps gateway for AI traffic. Intercept, audit, and route LLM requests to prevent data leaks and enforce zero-trust security policies.

title: daya7781r/miii-cli-offline-coder
summary: Miii-CLI 2026: Zero-Cost Local AI Coding Agent with Ollama – Fully Offline & Private

title: craiglush/parley
summary: 🪶 Self-hosted meeting capture & AI notes — transcribe, summarise, and act on every conversation, entirely on your own hardware.

title: niltonPegass/rag_ollama_langchain
summary: Hands-on RAG pipeline built with LangChain, LangGraph, LangSmith and Langflow - fully local inference via Ollama, no API costs. Covers four phases: basic chain, agentic graph with retry logic, observability tracing, and visual pipeline interface.

title: ortus-boxlang/bx-ai
summary: BoxLang AI is a fluent and human way to build AI Agents, Workflows and more

title: msemino/local-agent-orchestrator
summary: Running a 24/7 agent orchestrator (Hermes) with an uncensored local LLM brain on a single 24 GB NVIDIA GPU — the tuning that took it from 398s to 33s per reply. Self-hosted, no cloud.

title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.

title: AndreyLebedenko/jarvis-local
summary: Offline voice/vision assistant for Ollama with local TTS and screen capture.

title: 1ay1/agentty
summary: AI pair programming in your terminal — one static binary, sub-ms startup, any model

title: raydeStar/sir-thaddeus
summary: Private, local-first AI assistant for Windows - use your own model, keep durable memory, and approve every sensitive tool.

title: geoffmcc/sidekick
summary: Self-hosted agent platform with secure MCP tools, persistent memory, autonomous workflows, searchable knowledge, self-extension, and distributed CPU, GPU, and local-LLM compute.
